info.title: EdgeStore API
info.description: Management and runtime APIs for EdgeStore accounts, projects, buckets, files, and credentials.

managementBearer.description: A management token or customer dashboard session token.

projectKeyBasic.description: A project access key as the username and project secret key as the password.

RequestId.description: Identifier for correlating the request with EdgeStore logs.

RetryAfter.description: Seconds to wait before checking the asynchronous operation again.

message.default: This credential cannot access this operation
The credential is missing a required scope
The idempotency key was already used with a different request
A request with this idempotency key is still in progress
This operation is not available for personal accounts
The account storage limit has been exceeded
The account plan does not support file restoration
Signed read URLs are not available for this file
An account must retain an owner
The account project limit has been reached
The account member limit has been reached
The user is already an account member
A bucket with this name already exists
The bucket is currently being emptied
The bucket state changed during the operation
The project key is already revoked
The invitation is no longer active
The empty-bucket job cannot be retried
